summary: Testing iteration 16 - UX improvements update mode. All tests updated and passing for: 1) Maps tab moved from GM Screen to Campaign Dashboard, 2) Dice roller visibility (not on auth/landing, visible on gameplay pages), 3) Character Sheet with compact layout and spell slots. All 30 frontend tests pass, 31 backend tests pass.

frontend_tests.ux-updates.spec.ts: 10 passed - NEW: dice roller visibility, spell slots, maps location tests
frontend_tests.gm-screen-tabs.spec.ts: 12 passed - UPDATED: removed Maps tab test, verified Maps NOT on GM Screen
frontend_tests.map-builder.spec.ts: 8 passed - UPDATED: Maps now accessed from Campaign Dashboard

seed_data_creation: Using existing test character TEST_Elara_Wizard (ID: 5c200c1f-d584-4b3d-a3a2-e1b49b404e8d) and campaign TEST_CAMPAIGN_ID (1e6a6d0d-ad88-4b8a-9cc5-a1672119343c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX improvements fully verified: 1) Maps tab is in Campaign Dashboard sidebar (testid: maps-tab), NOT in GM Screen (tab-maps should not exist on GM Screen). 2) Dice roller (floating-dice-btn) appears only on gameplay pages (/campaigns, /player, /campaign/:id, /gm-screen/:id) but NOT on landing (/), auth (/auth), or pricing (/pricing). 3) Character Sheet has compact ability score blocks, spell slots section (SPELL SLOTS header), and SPELLCASTING section with Ability/Save DC/Attack Bonus. 4) End Combat navigates to Campaign Dashboard (/campaign/:id), not campaign list.

maps_tab_location.description: Maps tab is accessible from Campaign Dashboard sidebar, NOT on GM Screen

dice_roller_visibility.description: Dice roller (floating-dice-btn) does NOT appear on landing/auth pages, DOES appear on campaigns/player/dashboard pages

character_sheet_compact.description: Character Sheet displays compact ability scores with all 6 abilities, quick stats (HP/AC/Init/Speed/Prof), and spell slots section

end_combat_navigation.description: End Combat button navigates to Campaign Dashboard (/campaign/:id) not campaign list

gm_screen_tabs.description: GM Screen has 10 tabs (Combat, Dice, Monsters, Creatures, Names, Tables, Loot Gen, Inventory, Party, Notes) - Maps removed
